task_description: Check for unusual noise or vibration during operation. Listen for grinding or rattling sounds. Feel pump body for excessive vibration.
Observe pump operation - check for water discharge and normal pressure. Verify no leaks from pump body or pipe connections.
Inspect all pipe joints and connections for leaks. Check foot valve and strainer condition. Verify suction pipe is not blocked.
Check electrical connections for loose terminals. Inspect cable insulation for damage. Verify MCB/ELCB functioning properly.
Clean foot valve and strainer. Remove debris and sediment. Check valve flap movement. Clean pump impeller inlet if accessible.
Clean pump exterior. Remove dust and dirt from motor cooling vents. Wipe down pump casing. Check foundation for cracks.
Grease motor bearings through grease nipples (if provided). Use recommended bearing grease. Do not over-grease.
Check and tighten all electrical connections. Measure insulation resistance (should be >1 MΩ). Check capacitor condition (single phase pumps).
Measure motor current draw under normal load. Compare with nameplate rating. Check voltage at motor terminals.
Check pump coupling alignment (if external coupling). Inspect shaft seal for leakage. Check impeller clearance.
Inspect mechanical seal condition. Check for water leakage from weep hole. Replace seal if continuous dripping.
Open pump casing (after draining). Inspect impeller for wear and damage. Check casing for erosion. Clean thoroughly.
Check bearing condition - listen for noise
estimated_time_min: check play. Replace if noisy or rough. Re-grease with recommended lubricant.

task_description: Inspect shaft for straightness and surface condition. Check keyway for wear. Verify shaft seal seat condition.
Perform complete performance test. Measure flow rate and pressure. Compare with pump curve. Check efficiency.
Megger test motor windings (500V). Measure winding resistance. Check for any ground faults. Test capacitor (if single phase).
Monthly
estimated_time_min: Clean pump sump area. Remove accumulated solids. Check float switches operation. Clean level sensor probes.

task_description: Weekly
estimated_time_min: Check sewage pump discharge for flow consistency. Inspect for clogging. Verify alarm system functioning.

task_description: Quarterly
estimated_time_min: Pull up pump and clean impeller. Remove rags and debris. Check wear ring clearance. Clean volute casing.

task_description: Yearly
estimated_time_min: Check all stage impellers for wear. Inspect interstage bushings. Check shaft straightness. Measure stage-wise pressure.

task_description: Half-Yearly
estimated_time_min: Check balance piston clearance. Inspect thrust bearing condition. Verify axial play is within limits.

task_description: Yearly
estimated_time_min: Perform pressure test at shutoff head. Check maximum pressure against curve. Verify no pressure fluctuations.

task_description: Half-Yearly
estimated_time_min: Measure vibration levels using vibration meter. Check at bearing housings. Compare with baseline readings.

task_description: Monthly
estimated_time_min: Measure bearing housing temperature during operation. Should not exceed 70°C. Check motor winding temperature.
